title: Those Who Do Not Work Shall Not Eat
overview: After Chihiro loses his mother, he is faced with homelessness until he meets a man named Madoka who claims to be his uncle.

title: Failure Is the Mother of Success
overview: First, a girl named Miyako appears at Madoka's door. What is her connection to the Takatoris? Also, will Chihiro's friends find out his secret?

title: Feed a Dog for Three Days and He Will Remember It for Three Years
overview: Chihiro finds an abandoned dog on the street and takes it home, but Madoka is deathly afraid of dogs...

title: What One Likes, One Will Do Well
overview: Madoka seems down after Chihiro cleans his room, and Chihiro looks to his past to figure out why. Also, Miyako continues to practice cooking to impress Keiichiro.

title: A Man Never Goes Back on His Word
overview: When Chihiro sprains his ankle and can't do the housework, he worries about leaving it to Madoka. A few days later, Hino brings over a scary movie…

title: Even a Chance Encounter Is Preordained
overview: Chihiro and Hino meet a strange boy on the street who's looking for Madoka. Later, Chihiro and Miyako plan a birthday party.

title: Learning Does Not Happen in a Day
overview: Chihiro's school is having open house, but will he work up the nerve to ask Madoka? He also has to write an essay about his future dreams to present.

title: The Devil Scoffs When You Talk of Next Year
overview: It's the end of the year, which means Christmas presents and lots of cleaning! Fortunately, Hino is there to make sure everyone takes a break.

title: One Good Turn Deserves Another
overview: Chihiro sees the woman from Miyako's house again on his way home from school. Once he gets home, a young guest comes to visit him.

title: No Heat or Cold Lasts past the Equinox
overview: After Madoka's new plan to indulge in his cat fantasies doesn't quite work, Chihiro and Madoka prepare to visit Chihiro's family grave during the equinox.

title: Boys, Be Ambitious
overview: Chihiro and Madoka both seem down, so Hino and Miyako decide to have a flower viewing party to try and cheer them up.

title: All's Well That Ends Well
overview: Madoka gets sick during the busy wedding season, and Chihiro is visited by a strange girl…
